recap: Created ralph-is-running bin script and tests; exits 0 when ralph.json has non-empty mode, 1 otherwise; infers plan dir from git root + branch slug when called with no arg.

Replaced inline mode=single guard in ralph-single with ralph-is-running; now blocks on any active session. Fixed ralph-single.bats: corrected bats_run_zsh pattern and updated loop test to expect blocking.
